hero.title: Build <accent>freedom</accent> so businesses can <accent>break through</accent>
hero.description: We create flexible, intelligent platforms that reduce complexity, empower teams, and open more room for businesses to grow.

intro.description: From a small journey 17 years ago, <brand>XIPAT</brand> has grown with thousands of merchants and become a trusted global e-commerce technology builder.

about.title: We believe in the liberating power of <accent>technology</accent>
about.description1: The <brand>XIPAT</brand> team builds technology from deep human understanding to support entrepreneurs, sellers, and e-commerce teams to grow with stability, flexibility, and confidence in global markets.
about.description2: From small operational details to major leaps, Xipat stands with businesses to grow steadily, strongly, and meaningfully.

cards.title:
Omega
theme
cards.body: OmegaTheme delivers a compact toolkit for global sellers - from tracking and automation to conversion management - reducing complexity, optimizing operations, and scaling sustainably.

cards.title: Game Zoka
cards.body: OmegaTheme delivers a compact toolkit for global sellers - from tracking and automation to conversion management - reducing complexity, optimizing operations, and scaling sustainably.

solutions.title: Different Solutions For A Constantly Changing World

items.body: We focus on research and development of products with real value - meticulous in every detail, precise in every function, and strong enough to solve business problems end-to-end.
XIPAT technology is built to empower: helping entrepreneurs and teams become more confident, proactive, and sustainable.
In a changing world, we continuously adjust and update quickly - so businesses have stable tools and stay ready for every next move.

values.title: Empathy
values.body: Always think of others first, creating value for teammates, customers, and society.

values.title: Growth mindset
values.body: Continuously learn and improve every day to develop ourselves and build a sustainable organization.

values.title: Healthy spirit
values.body: Physical and mental health are the foundation for productive work and bigger ambitions.

values.title: Pursue the highest standards
values.body: Set and uphold high standards in thinking, people, and quality of work.

seo.description: Xipat builds technology platforms and solutions that reduce complexity, optimize operations, and drive sustainable growth.

hero.title: Application ecosystem for global eCommerce.
hero.description: OmegaTheme delivers a compact solution suite that helps sellers run operations more smoothly, optimize performance, and scale confidently across leading eCommerce platforms.

items.title: Deep eCommerce expertise
items.description: Every OmegaTheme app is built from real merchant challenges. We understand where businesses struggle and build practical solutions that deliver measurable outcomes.

items.title: Dedicated support and partnership
items.description: Our team supports you throughout operations and provides stage-by-stage guidance so you can make faster, better decisions.

items.title: Operational optimization
items.description: Standardize workflows and automate repetitive tasks to reduce operating cost, improve performance, and minimize system errors.

items.title: Innovation based on real needs
items.description: The product roadmap is shaped by real merchant feedback so every update stays close to actual business needs.

seo.title: Culture | Xipat
seo.description: Explore Xipat culture with an empathetic, growth-minded, and healthy team, plus internal activities and career opportunities.

hero.title:
A technology journey
built by people and
real values.
hero.description: For 17 years, we have continuously innovated to build enabling solutions that help Vietnamese and global businesses operate with confidence.

peopleShowcase.title:
XIPAT people innovate
to do better every day.
peopleShowcase.descriptionLead: From the early days of building products, we saw businesses and operations teams constantly dealing with complexity: messy data, overlapping workflows, and disconnected systems.
peopleShowcase.descriptionFollowUp: That is why every product is built around one core question:
peopleShowcase.descriptionEmphasis: can it free up time, reduce complexity, and create more room for business creativity?

productJourney.description: We build a product ecosystem serving tens of thousands of businesses globally, but what makes XIPAT different is not the number of apps. It is how we listen, how we innovate, and how we keep people at the center of every solution.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Xipat builds globally capable technology to help people grow, businesses thrive, and the world become better.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: Build an intelligent application ecosystem that helps businesses automate with ease, unlock data effectively, and achieve sustainable growth in the digital era.

items.title: Integrity
items.body: In a fast-changing technology market, XIPAT puts integrity at the foundation. Integrity means transparency, ethics, and the courage to do what is right. For us, “what is right matters more than who is right” is how trust is built with customers, partners, and teammates.

items.title: Effectiveness
items.body: XIPAT creates real value through effective technology products and services. For us, effectiveness means reaching goals by optimizing resources and delivering sustainable outcomes. It comes from seamless collaboration across teams and the effort of every Xipater.

items.title: Discipline
items.body: XIPAT believes discipline is the strength of a professional organization - consistency in action, respect for process, and accountability for outcomes. Discipline does not limit creativity; it helps us move faster, be more precise, and innovate in the right direction.

items.title: Creativity
items.body: As a technology company, XIPAT continuously innovates to improve experiences and create differentiated value. For us, creativity means finding better solutions - flexible, sustainable, and without trading off for unnecessary risk.

junior-marketing-partnership-crossell.title: Marketing | Partnership
overviewParagraphs: Xipat is looking for a Partnership Marketing specialist to grow strategic collaborations and cross-sell opportunities across our product ecosystem.
You will work closely with product, sales, and growth teams to design partnership plans, execute campaigns, and deliver measurable business outcomes.
responsibilities: Build and maintain partner pipeline for co-marketing opportunities.
Plan and execute partnership campaigns with clear KPI ownership.
Coordinate internal teams to launch joint initiatives on schedule.
Track campaign performance and optimize using data-driven insights.
Own communication cadence with partners and key stakeholders.
requirements: 3+ years in marketing, partnerships, or growth roles.
Strong communication and relationship management skills.
Comfortable with campaign analytics and reporting tools.
Ability to manage multiple projects with clear priorities.
benefits: Competitive compensation and performance review cycles.
Learning budget and mentorship from experienced leaders.
Opportunities to work on global SaaS products.
Modern workspace and flexible collaboration model.
junior-marketing-partnership-crossell.contactHint: (or apply directly via the form below)

senior-software-engineer-frontend.title: Senior Software Engineer | Frontend
overviewParagraphs: You will lead frontend architecture and implementation for high-impact product experiences used by global merchants.
This role combines hands-on coding, technical mentoring, and close collaboration with product and design teams.
responsibilities: Design scalable frontend architecture and shared UI patterns.
Build performant, maintainable interfaces in React/Next.js.
Review code quality and mentor junior engineers.
Collaborate with product and design to refine user experience.
Improve reliability through testing and monitoring best practices.
requirements: Strong experience with TypeScript, React, and Next.js.
Solid understanding of performance optimization and accessibility.
Proven ability to ship quality features in cross-functional teams.
Good communication and technical decision-making skills.
benefits: Competitive package with clear growth path.
Engineering culture focused on quality and ownership.
Modern tooling and structured technical mentorship.
Direct impact on products serving global customers.
Supportive work environment and team activities.
senior-software-engineer-frontend.contactHint: (or apply directly via the form below)

junior-marketing-performance.title: Junior Marketing | Performance
overviewParagraphs: We are hiring a Junior Performance Marketer to support paid campaigns and growth experiments across digital channels.
You will partner with growth and content teams to improve acquisition efficiency and campaign quality.
responsibilities: Assist in planning and executing paid media campaigns.
Monitor campaign metrics and prepare weekly reports.
Support A/B testing and landing page optimization.
Coordinate creatives and messaging with content team.
Identify optimization opportunities from data trends.
requirements: 1+ year in digital marketing or performance marketing.
Basic understanding of ad platforms and analytics.
Strong learning agility and detail-oriented mindset.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.
benefits: Exposure to global products and campaigns.
junior-marketing-performance.contactHint: (or apply directly via the form below)
